# Shared Memory Hot Index

> Last synced: {auto-updated by sync workflow}
> Memories: 0 entries across 0 domains

This file is the shared L2 hot cache. It loads at session start (~500 tokens).
Deep memories are in `memories/{domain}/` and loaded on demand.

## Trigger Map

Add entries here only after the full memory file is merged in `memories/`.
Format: `| trigger keywords | one-line pattern | domain:subject | confidence |`
